module.name: Dance Training
module.description: A structured training module for high-energy, flow-based, and EDM-inspired dance styles.

dance_breakdance.name: Breakdance
dance_breakdance.description: A high-energy style featuring power moves, spins, freezes, and stalls.

dance_contact_staff_flow.name: Contact Staff Flow
dance_contact_staff_flow.description: Master the art of balance, rolling, and fluid motion with a contact staff.

dance_cutting_shapes.name: Cutting Shapes
dance_cutting_shapes.description: Quick footwork techniques used in tech shuffle and Melbourne shuffle.

dance_dubstep_glitch.name: Dubstep & Glitch Dance
dance_dubstep_glitch.description: Slow-motion, popping, and robotic isolation movement synced with bass music.

dance_fan_dancing.name: Fan Dancing & Silk Flow
dance_fan_dancing.description: Create high-energy visual effects with fans, silk veils, and LED props.

dance_freestyle_rave.name: Freestyle Rave
dance_freestyle_rave.description: Unstructured, highly rhythmic personal dance style for raves.

dance_gloving_tutting.name: Gloving & Tutting
dance_gloving_tutting.description: Beat-synced, intricate finger and hand movements used in EDM dance.

dance_industrial_dance.name: Industrial Dance
dance_industrial_dance.description: Heavy, mechanical, and stomp-based movement inspired by cyber-goth styles.

dance_jumpstyle_hardstyle.name: Jumpstyle & Hardstyle
dance_jumpstyle_hardstyle.description: High-intensity kicks and bounces synchronized to fast beats.

dance_liquid_dance.name: Liquid Dance
dance_liquid_dance.description: Smooth, wave-like movements that create an illusion of continuous motion.

dance_poi_spinning.name: Poi Spinning
dance_poi_spinning.description: A dance flow art focusing on circles, tracers, and rhythmic hand coordination.
